scene_description: A person is interacting with colorful plastic dishes on a counter above an open storage area filled with more dishes and cups.

candidates.rationale: There is one green plate on the counter and three distinct plates (red, orange, purple) clearly visible in the storage area below.
One green cup is visible on the counter, and four colorful cups (pink, yellow, green, orange) are clearly visible in the drawer/shelf area.

scene_description: A person is using metal tongs to place a small wooden piece into a wooden shape sorter toy resting on a dark counter.

candidates.rationale: There are five distinct shapes cut out on the top surface of the wooden toy box (circle, triangle, two rectangles/slots, and a trapezoid/diamond shape).
Three loose wooden toy pieces are visible: a triangular prism block, a rectangular cuboid block, and a small cylindrical piece held by the tongs.

scene_description: A robotic arm is interacting with several cups and a jar of pistachios on a dark tabletop.

candidates.rationale: There are two green mugs, one pink cup lying down, one blue cup held by the robot, and one blue cup inside the drawer.
Two distinct green mugs with handles are standing upright on the table surface.

scene_description: A view of a desk surface showing wrapped snacks, a pen holder, and an open under-desk storage drawer.

candidates.rationale: Three distinct red wrappers labeled 'UNREAL' are clearly visible on the light-colored desk surface.
Four individual wrapped food items, three red and one yellow, are resting on the desk surface.

scene_description: A robot arm is attempting to grasp a notebook on a wooden conference table in an office setting.

candidates.rationale: Two black ring binders are clearly visible stacked on the back left of the table.
One full chair is visible on the left, and the backrest of a second chair is visible behind the table on the right.

scene_description: A collection of electronic components, cables, and supplies are arranged on a desk next to a robot arm, with a cardboard box on the floor.

candidates.rationale: Two distinct curved metal drawer handles are visible on the front of the dark desk cabinet.
There is one coiled orange cable near the top right and one coiled black cable near the bottom center of the desk.

scene_description: A wooden conference table is cluttered with electronics, cables, pens, and a person's leg is visible below.

candidates.rationale: There are five blue pens lying flat near the center-left of the table and two blue pens standing upright in the black desktop tray on the right.

scene_description: A hand places a pen into a black pen holder on a wooden desk next to a wire mesh stationery organizer.

candidates.rationale: Four upright markers (two yellow and two pink) are clearly visible standing in the left section of the wire mesh organizer.
Eight pens are visible, including the one held by the hand and the seven standing upright within the black cup on the right.

scene_description: A robotic arm is near an office chair that holds a green tray containing various objects, next to a pair of recycling bins.

candidates.rationale: There are two red/orange apples clearly visible inside the green tray on the chair.
There are two colored bins (one yellow and one dark) standing next to the wall near the robot arm.

scene_description: Various tools and packaged items are arranged on a small black table, with a cardboard box sitting on the floor below.

candidates.rationale: There is one orange coiled cable and one black coiled cable resting on the right side of the table.
Two orange handheld tools, likely tape measures or similar, are visible near the center-right of the table.

scene_description: A robotic arm is interacting with several dry erase markers arranged on a table cluttered with cups and snacks.

candidates.rationale: Four orange and white markers are lying on the table, and one is being held by the robot's gripper.
Five small white paper bowls with a green rim are clearly stacked together near the center of the table.
